Text: "The NAACP Travel Advisory for the state of Missouri, effective through August 28th, 2017, calls for African American travelers, visitors and Missourians to pay special attention and exercise extreme caution when traveling throughout the state given the series of questionable, race-based incidents occurring statewide recently, and noted therein," the group's statement reads.
truth: “2017 年 8 月 28 日生效的 NAACP 密苏里州旅行咨询中呼吁，因近期密苏里州发生了一系列可疑的种族性事件，所有非裔美籍旅行者、游客以及密苏里州人在密苏里州旅行时应特别注意并采取极其谨慎的态度，特此告知，”该团体的声明宣称。

Text: Sage said: “It's a pleasure for me to help Chinese friends prepare for the New Year. It is equally important to clean the apartment and paste the red spring couplets with blessing words on the door. On New Year’s eve, all family members must gather together to have a good meal and stay until midnight, and finally to celebrate the New Year with fireworks. For foreigners, spending the night with friends and their family is indeed an opportunity for blending. ”
truth: 塞希说：“我建议帮助中国朋友为过年做准备，打扫公寓和在家门贴上写有新年祝福语的红色春联同等重要，在除夕那一天，所有的家庭成员都要齐集一堂吃一顿丰盛的大餐，然后守岁到午夜，用绚丽响亮的焰火迎接新年。对外国人而言，与朋友和家人共度这个夜晚的确是一个融入的机会。”
pre: 賢者說道： “幫助中國朋友準備新年是我非常愉快的工作。清潔房屋和在門上貼上紅春聯，祝福話語，同樣重要。除夕夜，所有家庭成員都必須聚集在一起，享用一頓豐盛的晚餐，等到半夜，最後一起點燃鞭炮，慶祝新年。對於外國人來說，與朋友和家人一起度過夜晚，確實是一種融入的機會。 ”

Text: As the authorities in major markets of Bitcoin -- such as China, South Korea and the European Union -- take decisive regulatory measures, the digital currency market dominated by Bitcoin has experienced major bloodshed this week. The price of Bitcoin has fallen below 10,000 dollar, recording the biggest one-day drop.

Text: It is about the contemporary resonance of Lazarus's startling words, the only ones in which a state has appeared to invite not just any old immigrants, but the poorest of the poor: "Your tired, your poor, / Your huddled masses yearning to breathe free, / The wretched refuse of your teeming shore."
truth: 这涉及到拉撒路惊世之语的现代回音，唯一一个国家似乎不仅邀请任何老移民，而且还邀请穷人中最贫穷的人：“你的疲惫、你的穷困、或者你的挤作一团的民众渴望自由呼吸，/苦难的人拒绝你拥挤的海滩。”

Text: Zou Shoumin, Director of the Bureau of Environmental Supervision of the Ministry of Environmental Protection, said on the 22nd in Beijing that on a nationwide basis, 57 cases were subject to consecutive daily fines. Text: Presently, the environmental protection bureaus across China may use various means of punishment to investigate and deal with conduct in violation of environmental regulations such as impose consecutive daily fines, close down operations and/or distrain, limit or suspend production, and persons held under administrative detention. They will also work together with judicial organs to punish environmental crimes.

Text: Although pressures from slower economic growth have emerged, China’s Ministry of Environmental Protection had already made its position clear; China should correctly and appropriately position environmental protection in economic growth, and increase “green determination”. The more economic growth decelerates, the more it should hold fast to environmental protection, and ensure that environmental protection plays a positive role in optimizing the economy.
truth: 虽然经济下行压力显现，但中国环保部此前已明确表态，中国应正确处理好环境保护在经济发展中的定位，增强“绿色定力”，越是经济增速下行，越不能放松环保，发挥好环境保护对经济的优化作用。
pre: 尽管来自经济增长放缓的压力已经出现，中国的环境保护部已经明确了自己的立场；中国应该在经济增长中正确地、适当地把握环境保护，增强“绿色意志”。经济增长越慢，越应该坚持环境保护，确保环境保护在优化经济中发挥积极作用。

Text: Figures from the National Bureau of Statistics revealed that China’s GDP grew 6.9% year-on-year for the first three quarters of 2017, 0.2 percentage points higher than the same period last year. In particular, the growth rates for the first, second and third quarters were 6.9%, 6.9% and 6.8%, respectively. For nine consecutive quarters, GDP growth ranged between 6.7% and 6.9%, maintaining a medium to high rate of growth.

Text: Recently, the China Federation of Literary and Art Circles organized part of the representatives of the 19th NPC from the literary and art circle and well-known artists to form a promotional group and went to Inner Mongolia, Heilongjiang, Gansu, Shanghai, Guangdong and Guizhou to tour and spread the word of the grand spirit of the 19th NPC.
truth: 近日，中国文联组织部分文艺界十九大代表和知名艺术家组成宣讲团，分赴内蒙古、黑龙江、甘肃、上海、广东、贵州等地巡回宣讲十九大精神。
pre: 近日，中国文艺界联合会组织了19届全国人民代表大会的文艺界代表和知名艺术家一行，成立了推介团并赴内蒙古、黑龙江、甘肃、上海、广东和贵州进行巡礼和宣传19届全国人民代表大会的伟大精神。
